steps.title: Spot the causal relationship required
steps.content: The goal requires showing that media transformed Wong Fei-hung's status from local figure to international folk hero. The winning choice must position media depiction as the cause of his legacy.

steps.title: Find how media transformed his status
steps.content:
Choice D directly establishes this with “has turned him into an internationally known folk hero”—the verb “turned” shows media depiction as the cause of his transformation from local to international fame.

The others either reverse the timeline (A) or mention media without establishing how it transformed his legacy (B, C).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
